_meta.derived_note: pen.json is DERIVED from pen20 classic-version evo data (the 5 versions are largely shared) with pen ORIGINAL timers + pen 127-sprite roster. A separate clean humulos /pen/ per-version pull would refine fidelity (pen has no 20th additions; some pen20 evo targets here may be 20th-only and show as sprite_gaps). 5 CLASSIC versions captured (Nature Spirits/Deep Savers/Nightmare Soldiers/Wind Guardians/Metal Empire). pen20's 20th-anniversary BONUS lines (Guilmon/V-mon/Terriermon/DORUmon/Ryudamon/etc.) NOT yet pulled -> addition_pending. Minor extraction noise: a few branch targets dropped (see device._unresolved), Mugendra=Mugendramon. JOGRESS is the key mechanic (jogress_attrs/jogress_partner/jogress_partners).

evolves_to.raw: 0-1 CM, 0-2 Effort OR 0-1 CM, 0-3 Effort OR 2-4 CM, 4 Effort
